function.message: I can’t complete this inbox task as written because one of the five requested OCR source files is missing (the underscore-prefixed duplicate variant). I found and read four valid files, but completing only 4/5 would be partial. Please confirm the intended fifth file (or confirm it was a duplicate) and I can proceed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read relevant inbox/OCR/migration/schema docs, and complied with rule to avoid partial completion when a referenced file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md lists five files. Four were readable, but the fifth requested underscore-prefixed variant was not found; additional search in purchases confirmed only the non-underscored Juniper SSD file exists. Per task rules, missing required input requires clarification rather than partial edits.
